mapper.select: SELECT * FROM game_account WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY bind_time DESC
SELECT * FROM game_account WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM game_account WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND game_uid = #{gameUid} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO game_account (user_id, game_uid, server_name, in_game_name, account_level, status, bind_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{gameUid}, #{serverName}, #{inGameName}, #{accountLevel}, 1, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE game_account SET server_name = #{serverName}, in_game_name = #{inGameName}, account_level = #{accountLevel}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE game_account SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
